title: ollama extension: Gemini 3 thinking models fail with 400 "missing thought_signature" in tool calls
summary:

The bundled `ollama` extension at `~/.gsd/agent/extensions/ollama/ollama-chat-provider.js` only handles `<think>...</think>` inline thinking format. It does not propagate Gemini 3's structured `thoughtSignature` field, so the first tool call against any Gemini 3 cloud model returns HTTP

title: [PR] feat(chatbot): upgrade chatbot to Groq LLM (strict ServiceHub scope)
summary:
## Summary

- Replace the **frontend regex / static FAQ chatbot** with a real LLM (Groq cloud, Llama 3.3 70B; Ollama as local fallback). Free tier only — no paid APIs, no new npm dependencies.

title: [PR] feat(docker-sandbox): inject Steward proxy + RPC URLs when USE_STEWARD_PROXY=true
summary: Match the legacy on-prem worker's Steward proxy mode: when USE_STEWARD_PROXY=true, inject STEWARD_PROXY_URL plus OPENAI_BASE_URL, ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, and public EVM RPC URLs into the agent container so LLM and RPC traffic routes through the Steward proxy and bills correctly. Pure helper buildSteward

title: [PR] Install local Helicone gateway stack
summary:
## Summary

- Adds opt-in installer support for a local Helicone gateway stack.
- Installs Helicone all-in-one Docker dashboard/Jawn/storage plus standalone `@helicone/ai-gateway@0.2.0-beta.30` for actual routing.
- Wires Calciforge `[proxy]` to `backend_type = "helicone"`, exposes `gateway_ui_url`,
